title: Citrusy Flaky Mexican Fig Crumble
description: A moist and flavorful citrusy flaky crumble with figs, perfect for a monsoon-inspired breakfast dish that's egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsalted butter, chilled and cubed
8 ounces fresh figs, halved and lightly pitted

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch square baking dish with butter.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour and unsalted butter until it resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in the honey, orange zest, and orange juice.
Add halved figs to the mixture and stir gently to combine. Pour into prepared pan.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and bubbling on top. Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
